description: Represents a user group in the Dynatrace account.
name: Group

groupId.description: The unique identifier of the group.

name.description: The display name of the group.

description.description: An optional description of the group's purpose or scope.

owner.description: The identifier of the group owner. LOCAL indicates the group is managed within Dynatrace; SSO indicates it is synced from an identity provider.

createdAt.description: The date and time when the group was created.

updatedAt.description: The date and time when the group was last updated.
